project1.title: CostaSpanish Academy
project1.subtitle: Landing page for showcasing and selling Spanish courses.
project1.desc: High-performance landing page built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind for a Spanish as a foreign language academy. The platform includes advanced SEO, i18n, conversion-focused lead generation forms, and dynamic content retrieved from a MongoDB database. Its modular and scalable architecture is designed to evolve into a full LMS, following best practices in accessibility, performance, and CI/CD deployment on Vercel.

project2.title: Learning System Managment CostaSpanish
project2.subtitle: SaaS for educational management
project2.desc: Full-stack SaaS platform built with Next.js and TypeScript, focused on automating educational management. The core of the system is a business logic engine powered by MongoDB, handling pedagogical profiles and a real-time transactional credit system. On the frontend side, it features highly interactive interfaces and multi-step forms with optimized global state management (avoiding prop drilling and cascading renders) through react-hook-form and type-safe validation with Zod.
